inputs.label: Fathoms
inputs.businessContext: The length value in fathoms to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length value in fathoms to convert.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The exact conversion factor from fathoms to meters, as defined by international standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: The exact conversion factor from fathoms to meters, as defined by international standards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uluslararası standartlara göre tanımlanan kulaçtan metreye tam dönüşüm faktörü.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output, based on precision requirements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output, based on precision requirements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hassasiyet gereksinimlerine bağlı olarak çıktıdaki ondalık basamak sayısı.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable measurement tolerance for quality assurance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable measurement tolerance for quality assurance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite güvencesi için kabul edilebilir ölçüm toleransı.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Relative measurement uncertainty in the input fathom value (percentage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative measurement uncertainty in the input fathom value (percentage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giriş kulaç değerindeki bağıl ölçüm belirsizliği (yüzde).

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety factor applied to the converted value for engineering design, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety factor applied to the converted value for engineering design, if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mühendislik tasarımı için dönüştürülen değere uygulanan güvenlik faktörü (varsa).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
